data.title: Small caps hit new high, Dow Jones split with Tesla, Broadcom, AppLovin as key losers. Nvidia chipmaker Taiwan Semi looms.
data.description: While small caps reached a new peak, larger indexes were hindered by declines from Tesla, Broadcom, AppLovin, and Wells Fargo. Taiwan Semiconductor, a chipmaker for Nvidia, is an impending presence. Dow Jones Futures show a divided market, with Tesla, Broadcom, and AppLovin as key losers. The Nvidia chipmaker's performance is eagerly awaited.
Australian equities advanced further, led by a jump in mining stocks to record levels.
A UN Security Council meeting on Iran may take place on January 15 at the request of the US - reports
Hong Kong, China stocks to outpace US equities all year-SCMP

data.title: Aya Gold & Silver Inc. announces board transition with two members not standing for re-election.
data.description: In Montreal on January 14, 2026, Aya Gold & Silver Inc. (TSX: AYA; OTCQX: AYASF) disclosed that two prominent members of its Board of Directors, Robert Taub, Chair, and Dr. Jürgen Hambrecht, Lead Independent Director, will not seek re-election at the upcoming annual meeting. Following the conclusion of their current terms, both individuals will retire from the Board.
The yield on Japan’s 5-year government bond eased by 3.0 basis points to 1.610%.

data.title: Psyence BioMed implements 1-for-6.25 reverse stock split on Jan. 14, 2026, following special resolution.
data.description: Psyence Biomedical Ltd. announced on Jan. 14, 2026, that their 1-for-6.25 share consolidation (reverse stock split) has become effective. The decision was made after shareholders approved a special resolution on April 16, 2025, allowing the Board of Directors to implement a share consolidation at a ratio of up to 1-for-50. Initially, the Board set a 1-for-7.97 consolidation ratio on May 5, 2025. Following this, a second share consolidation at a ratio of 1-for-6.25 was approved on December 4, 2025. The company's Nasdaq symbol is PBM.

data.title: STEER Tech and KINEXON partner for autonomous vehicle tech, enhancing safety, efficiency. Annapolis Junction, Md., Jan. 14, 2026.
data.description: STEER Tech and KINEXON have collaborated to enhance autonomous operations at industrial facilities in Annapolis Junction, MD. This partnership aims to make industrial operations safer, smarter, and more scalable. STEER Tech, known for its groundbreaking autonomous vehicle technology, has joined forces with KINEXON, a prominent player in real-time location tracking in industrial settings. This collaboration, formed on January 14, 2026, signifies a significant step towards revolutionizing the industry. Through this partnership, they aim to leverage cutting-edge technology to improve operational efficiency and safety across industrial facilities.

data.title: Allegiant Travel Company promotes senior leadership to enhance organizational depth for long-term success. Jan. 14, 2026.
data.description: In Las Vegas on January 14, 2026, Allegiant Travel Company (NASDAQ: ALGT) revealed a series of senior leadership promotions aimed at enhancing organizational capabilities. These strategic moves are designed to solidify the company's foundation and propel it towards sustained success in the future. This comes as Allegiant Travel Company gears up for a crucial next phase, marked by the introduction of new leadership roles and functions within the company.
